name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Idle, Trying, Critical, N

VARIABLES state, turn

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ turn = 1
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> Idle]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
       /\ state[p] = Idle
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Trying]
       /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
       /\ state[p] = Trying
       /\ turn = p
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Critical]
       /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
       /\ state[p] = Critical
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]
       /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states, States

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
Forks == forks \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1]
States == states \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ Forks
        /\ States = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states' == [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ states' == [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
        \/ /\ states' == [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
        \/ /\ states' == states
          /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: no two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ Forks
          /\ States
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] \in 0..N-1
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[Left(i)] = 0 \/ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[Right(i)] = 0 \/ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                 /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N]) + 1]
                 /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ queue' = Append(queue, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ queue' = Tail(queue)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>>
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), Head(readers))
        /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), Head(readers))
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), Head(readers))
        /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ ackedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks :
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss
            /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = 

                    Append(retransmitCount, RetransmitCount(i) + 1)

                    Append(retransmitCount, 1)
            /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        \/ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ \E ack \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ ack
                /\ ackedChunks' = Append(ackedChunks, i)
                /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
                /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
            \/ \E ack \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                    /\ loss
                    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
                    /\ retransmitCount' = 

                            Append(retransmitCount, RetransmitCount(i) + 1)

                            Append(retransmitCount, 1)
                    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                \/ \E ack \in BOOLEAN :
                    /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                        /\ loss
                        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
                        /\ retransmitCount' = 

                                Append(retransmitCount, RetransmitCount(i) + 1)

                                Append(retransmitCount, 1)
                        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                    \/ \E ack \in BOOLEAN :
                        /\ ack
                        /\ ackedChunks' = Append(ackedChunks, i)
                        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
                        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq]
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ ackedChunks \in Seq
    /\ \A i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ i \in sentChunks \implies i \in retransmitCount
    /\ \A i \in sentChunks :
        /\ RetransmitCount(i) \in 1..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ \A i \in ackedChunks :
        /\ RetransmitCount(i) \in 1..MAX_RETRIES

RetransmitCount(i) ==

        RetransmitCount(i)

        0

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE, ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE, ![2] = TRUE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ p \in free
        /\ c \in Client
        /\ p \in Pages
        /\ p \notin allocated[c]
        /\ \A c' \in Client : c' \in Client \ {c} => allocated'[c'] = allocated[c']

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
